title: valeriana collina var. simplex
intro: Valeriana collina var. simplex is a lesser-known variety of the valerian plant, which is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Valerianaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a sedative and a muscle relaxant, due to the presence of valerenic acid and valepotriates. The health benefits of Valeriana collina var. simplex include improved sleep quality, reduced anxiety and stress levels, and relief from muscle spasms and menstrual cramps. Valerian root preparations, such as tinctures, capsules, and teas, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to fully understand its effects.
